name: 4q35_D4Z4_FSHD1_macrosatellite
description: 4q35.2 D4Z4 macrosatellite — 3.3 kb GC-rich repeat unit, each unit encoding a copy of the DUX4 retrogene. Healthy individuals carry 11-100 D4Z4 units; FSHD1 patients carry 1-10 units on a permissive 4qA haplotype (poly-A signal stabilises DUX4 mRNA). A near-identical D4Z4 array also exists on 10q26, complicating mapping and Southern blotting.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of 3.3 kb units, each containing the DUX4 ORF. Allele length varies 1-100 units. Highly homologous (>98%) array on 10q26 (~chr10:133.65-133.72 Mb GRCh38) confounds mapping; the distinguishing 4qA/4qB SSLP and pLAM poly-A signal lie 3' of the array on chr4.
